Notes: Sierra Wireless filed Chapter 15 bankruptcy protection in Jan 2026. Allocation frozen. Telit is approved alternate but requires antenna impedance revalidation and updated AT command firmware library. 14-week NPI required.
Antenna swap required to match Telit module impedance spec. Same supplier — Taoglas — but different part. 50-ohm vs 75-ohm termination. Form factor identical. Mechanical fit confirmed.
H753 adds AES-256 hardware acceleration required for upcoming FedRAMP compliance certification. Pin-compatible. BSP changes needed. Estimated 3-week firmware delta.
Doubling flash to support encrypted firmware partition required by FedRAMP. Same Winbond family. Same footprint. SPI driver compatible. Unit cost increase $2.40.

Vicor lead time has extended to 56 days and unit cost increased 18% in Q1 2026 pricing. Murata equivalent tested and approved by EE team. 15% cost reduction. Lead time drops to 21 days. 4-week production validation run required.

3 field returns in Q4 2025 showed gasket compression set failure after thermal cycling. Harder durometer maintains IP67 seal integrity over wider temp range. Same supplier SealTech. Same part envelope. IP67 retest required before release.

EU Radio Equipment Directive update requires revised CE declaration of conformity referencing EN 303 413 standard. Label artwork update only. No physical changes. Regulatory approval in progress — expected April 15 2026.

Two additional bulk caps needed on MCU power rail to meet H753 transient response spec during AES acceleration bursts. Existing footprint has unpopulated pads DNP'd on current board revision. No PCB change required. BOM qty update only.

Field data shows USB-C port used in <2% of deployed units after initial commissioning. Removal saves $0.95 unit cost and eliminates ESD failure mode seen in 4 RMAs. Firmware update to disable USB enumeration required. Config workflow moves fully to Ethernet.
PCB revision required to accommodate: (1) MCU upgrade footprint pad refinement
column12: (4) minor trace re-route on power plane for H753 AES block. Full DFM review and first article inspection required. 8-week PCB re-spin lead time from Apex Circuit Works.
